# ML Diagnostics Checklist

## Minimum diagnostics

- Quote the truncation depth and explain why it is large enough for the reported claim.
- Report a modular residual or equivalent loss diagnostic, not only the final candidate spectrum.
- Compare against at least one non-ML benchmark such as the 2016 bound, the 2023 integrality result, or the 2023 geometric threshold.
- Label every candidate spectrum as unverified unless an exact consistency argument is provided.
- Keep the distinction between finite central charge `c` and any unrelated unit notation explicit.

## Current status

This checklist exists, but no local ML run has been executed yet.
